title: Stomoisia cornuta
taxonomy: Stomoisia cornuta is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Stomoisia, which is a group of succulents native to southern Africa. The Aizoaceae family, also known as the ice plant family, comprises about 140 genera and 2,500 species. Stomoisia cornuta is one of the lesser-known species within this family. Further research is needed to fully understand the taxonomic classification of Stomoisia cornuta.
